title: Complete Interactions API Tool Turn and Provider Context Circulation
description: The application reads only output text, misses function-call steps, executes twice, sends a result without call identity, drops provider context, and reports success before final model output. Learners cumulatively produce one complete correlated Gemini tool turn through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Classify model output, function call, function result, built-in tool, retrieval, safety, error, and terminal interaction steps exhaustively.
Reserve call identity before execution and reconcile retries so one logical function call cannot create duplicate effects.
Return the exact function name, call ID, bounded typed result parts, and required tools and configuration in the follow-up interaction.
